EipBandwidthScalingCapacity.eip: The EIP to be updated, including IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP.
EipBandwidthScalingCapacity.clientToken: See [Idempotency Token](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
EipBandwidthScalingCapacity.newBandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For prepay and bandwidth billing EIPs, must be an integer between 1 and 200; for traffic billing EIPs, must be an integer between 1 and 1000.
